articles.title: Jharkhand Police seek army help to defuse suspected WWII-era bomb
articles.description: East Singhbhum SP (Rural) Rishav Garg said the bomb detection and disposal squad (BDDS) from Ranchi inspected the site in Baharagora on Thursday and found the device to be "active" and heavy.

Trump, who said at the time he had chosen to spare oil infra, had threatened to reconsider his decision over the Strait of Hormuz closure.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran war Live Updates: Israel warns Iranian long-range missiles could reach ‘London, Paris or Berlin’

dailyNews.title: Vanderbilt's Hail Mary shot misses by narrowest of margins as Nebraska advances to Sweet 16 in epic fashion
dailyNews.description: A near miracle fell short as Tyler Tanner’s half-court heave clanged off the backboard and rim, denying Vanderbilt a Sweet 16 berth in a 74-72 loss to Nebraska.

dailyNews.title: Man found not guilty by reason of insanity in killing of pregnant Seattle woman, unborn child
dailyNews.description: Cordell Goosby was found not guilty by reason of insanity in the 2023 shooting death of pregnant Seattle woman Eina Kwon, which subsequently killed her unborn child.

dailyNews.description: Experts say Iran's Diego Garcia missile launch exposes deception about range limits, and analysts warn Europe now faces a direct ballistic threat.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Finally Eyeing an Exit From Iran. But Will He Take It?
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he is considering “winding down” operations in Iran. But many of his original war goals remain unaccomplished.

dailyNews.title: Robert Mueller, Former FBI Director Who Led Trump Inquiry, Dies at 81
dailyNews.description: He imposed the most significant overhaul of the F.B.I. in its history. Later, after concluding that Russia had interfered in the 2016 election, he became a target of the president’s anger.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Reaction to Mueller’s Death: ‘Good, I’m Glad.’
dailyNews.description: The president has been known to disparage foes after their deaths. His response to Mr. Mueller’s death drew criticism from Republicans and Democrats.

dailyNews.title: What Was the Mueller Investigation? And What Did It Find?
dailyNews.description: The appointment of Robert S. Mueller III as special counsel to conduct an investigation related to a sitting president roiled Washington around the start of President Trump’s first term.

dailyNews.title: Mullin Explored Bipartisan Deal to Rein in Immigration Crackdown
dailyNews.description: The G.O.P. senator President Trump chose to lead the Department of Homeland Security privately discussed concessions the White House has repeatedly rejected.

dailyNews.title: ICE Agents to Be Sent to U.S. Airports on Monday, Trump Says
dailyNews.description: The president issued a threat to deploy ICE agents in an apparent attempt to force Democrats to approve a new budget for the Department of Homeland Security.

dailyNews.title: Trump Has Made a Fundamental Miscalculation about Iran
dailyNews.description: America shouldn’t fight a war like this.

dailyNews.title: Over 100 wounded in strikes on Israel; Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's power plants
dailyNews.description: President Trump on Saturday night threatened to "obliterate" Iran's power plants, starting with its largest one, if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened within 48 hours.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to use ICE for airport security amid worsening delays
dailyNews.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options for deploying thousands of ground troops in Iran
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions

dailyNews.title: Intelligence chiefs' testimony is out of sync with Trump's talking points
dailyNews.description: For the first time since the U.S. launched a war on Iran, this week top intelligence officials spoke publicly about the conflict.
